name: Mini Survival Challenge
description: Mini Survival Challenge is a free escape online game for boys on a desert island to survive. There are many players competing here. You need to break through various difficulties by using different props. There are many trap monsters, just observe the design in the scene, and plan the route to escape successfully in the face of crisis!
tags: 3D, Adventure, Android, Animal, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Car, Escape, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Multiplayer, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle
